prerequisites: A Lob account. Sign up at lob.com to access the dashboard.

A Lob API key obtained from the dashboard at Settings > API Keys (https://dashboard.lob.com/settings/api-keys). Use a secret API key (prefixed test_ for the test environment or live_ for the live environment).
A start_date value defining the earliest point from which to sync records.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Lob protects API requests with HTTP Basic authentication. Provide your Lob API key in the api_key field. Lob uses the API key as the username and leaves the password blank. Use a secret API key (test_ prefix for the test environment, live_ prefix for the live environment); secret keys grant full access and must be kept confidential.

setupSteps.title: Create a Lob account
setupSteps.body: Sign up for an account at lob.com. Live requests additionally require email verification and a payment method on file, since each live mail request incurs a charge and cannot be undone.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key
setupSteps.body: Log in to the Lob dashboard and go to Settings > API Keys (https://dashboard.lob.com/settings/api-keys). Copy a secret API key. Test keys are prefixed with test_ and do not produce real mail; live keys are prefixed with live_.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the secret API key in the required api_key field. Set the required start_date to the earliest date from which to sync. Optionally set limit to control the page size of records returned per API request.
